description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rough, jagged surface and a mix of mineral inclusions. The rock displays a dominant grayish-brown color with prominent white quartz veins and patches of dark, metallic-looking minerals, possibly galena or chalcopyrite, giving it a slightly iridescent sheen in some areas. The surface is uneven, with sharp edges and a few smoother, weathered sections. A rectangular, aged paper label with handwritten text is affixed to one of the flatter surfaces, suggesting it may have been cataloged or collected for study. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or significant fractures. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A dense, jagged rock with gray, white, and dark metallic patches, featuring a paper label on one side. Its rough, irregular surface and mineral inclusions give it a striking, natural appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the rock's rough, angular face with visible white quartz veins and a prominent paper label on the upper surface.
description_view_1: The second view shows more of the dark, metallic mineral patches and the rock's uneven, crystalline texture.
description_view_2: From this angle, the rock's brownish-gray base and the edge of the paper label are visible, with fewer mineral inclusions apparent.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the smoother, weathered side of the rock and provides a clearer look at the paper label affixed to its surface.
